title: Claude 4.6 Opus Released with 1M Context Window
summary: Anthropic launches its most capable model yet, featuring a massive 1 million token context window and improved reasoning across complex tasks.

title: OpenAI Rolls Out GPT-5 to Enterprise Customers
summary: OpenAI begins enterprise rollout of GPT-5, featuring native multimodal capabilities and improved tool use for business automation workflows.

title: AI Adoption Hits 78% Among US Small Businesses
summary: New survey data shows AI adoption among small businesses has nearly doubled year-over-year, with content generation and customer service leading use cases.

title: Google DeepMind Introduces Gemini 3.0 Ultra
summary: Google's latest AI model shows breakthrough performance in scientific reasoning and code generation, now available through Vertex AI.

title: EU AI Act Enforcement Begins for High-Risk Systems
summary: The European Union begins enforcing its landmark AI Act, requiring compliance audits for AI systems used in hiring, lending, and healthcare.

title: Microsoft Copilot Now Handles Multi-App Workflows
summary: Microsoft expands Copilot capabilities to orchestrate tasks across Office, Teams, and third-party apps — moving toward true AI agent functionality.
